nodes.name: HTTP Request — GPT-4o Vision: Analyse model images
HTTP Request — Claude: Generate PrintHub Product Content
HTTP Request — Save AI enhancement to PrintHub

parameters.name: body
parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', max_tokens: 1000, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a social media copywriter for PrintHub Africa, a Nairobi printing company. British English. KES pricing.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Generate social media captions for this 3D printed product.
Product name: ' + $node["HTTP Request — Claude: Generate PrintHub Product Content"].json.content[0].text.includes('product_name') ? JSON.parse($node["HTTP Request — Claude: Generate PrintHub Product Content"].json.content[0].text).product_name : $json.originalName + '
Description: ' + $json.originalDescription + '

Return ONLY valid JSON: { instagram: "caption max 150 words 5-10 hashtags", facebook: "caption max 100 words", tiktok: "caption max 80 words energetic", linkedin: "caption max 120 words B2B", x: "max 280 chars", pinterest: "descriptive keyword-rich", snapchat: "max 50 words punchy", youtube_community: "max 200 words", google_business: "max 300 words" }' }] }) }}

parameters.name: body
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'SUPPORT_TICKET', title: 'AI Enhanced: ' + $json.importId + ' ready for review', message: 'AI has generated product listing. Review and approve in admin catalogue.', urgency: 'low', actionUrl: 'https://admin.printhub.africa/catalogue/review/' + $json.importId, targetRoles: ['ADMIN', 'SUPER_ADMIN'] }) }}

parameters.name: body
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflowName: 'AI-7 Catalogue Enhancement', action: 'AI_CATALOGUE_ENHANCEMENT_COMPLETED', details: { importId: $json.importId, platform: $json.platform } }) }}

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={ "model": "gpt-4o", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "You are a social media and advertising copywriter for PrintHub Africa. Your style is punchy, engaging, and high-energy. You use emojis effectively. You understand Nairobi's trends and slang (Sheng) where appropriate for Gen Z audiences, but remain professional for LinkedIn. You always include targeted hashtags. British English only. No Americanisms." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Create short, punchy social media posts for this product: {{ $json.name }}. Description: {{ $json.description }}. Category: {{ $json.category }}. Write unique versions for: 1. Instagram (visual, emoji-heavy), 2. TikTok (hook-driven, trendy), 3. LinkedIn (professional, B2B value). Return valid JSON: { 'instagram': '...', 'tiktok': '...', 'linkedin': '...' }" }] }
={ "productId": "{{ $node['Get Product Context'].json.id }}", "socialPosts": {{ $json.choices[0].message.content }} }
={ "model": "whisper-1", "language": "en", "prompt": "PrintHub Africa customer service. Kenyan English. Printing services, 3D printing, banners, signage." }

={ "model": "claude-opus-4-6", "max_tokens": 400, "system": "You are the content and customer service AI for PrintHub Africa... Note: if the customer sent a voice note, it was transcribed. Acknowledge this naturally if relevant. Context: {{ JSON.stringify($node['Get Customer Context'].json) }}", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Customer Message: {{ $node['Whisper Transcription'].json.text || $node['Is Voice Note?'].json.body.entry[0].changes[0].value.messages[0].text.body }}. Write a helpful reply." }] }

={ "messaging_product": "whatsapp", "to": "{{ $node['Is Voice Note?'].json.body.entry[0].changes[0].value.messages[0].from }}", "type": "text", "text": { "body": "{{ $json.content[0].text.replace('[ESCALATE]', '') }}" } }

={ "service": "Anthropic", "operation": "customer-reply", "model": "claude-opus-4-6", "inputTokens": 500, "outputTokens": {{ $node['Claude: Generate Reply'].json.usage.output_tokens }}, "costUsd": {{ ($node['Claude: Generate Reply'].json.usage.input_tokens * 0.000015) + ($node['Claude: Generate Reply'].json.usage.output_tokens * 0.000075) }}, "success": true }

parameters.name: body
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflowName: 'AI-2 WhatsApp Auto-Reply', errorMessage: $json.message || 'Unknown error', node: $json.node || 'Unknown node', executionId: $execution.id }) }}

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={ "model": "gpt-4o", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "You are a social media and advertising copywriter for PrintHub Africa..." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Generate 3 ad copy variations for {{ $json.name }}. Target: Meta Ads and Google Search. Return JSON array of objects: [{ 'platform': 'meta', 'headline': '...', 'body': '...', 'cta': '...' }]" }] }
={ "productId": "{{ $node['Get Product Details'].json.id }}", "adCopyVariations": {{ $json.choices[0].message.content }} }

={ "model": "claude-opus-4-6", "max_tokens": 1000, "system": "You are the content and customer service AI for PrintHub Africa...", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Write a compelling, SEO-optimised product description for {{ $json.name }}. Include: 1. Main description (200 words), 2. Short description (50 words), 3. 5 Key Features as a list, 4. SEO meta title, 5. SEO meta description. Return valid JSON." }] }
={ "productId": "{{ $node['Get Context'].json.id }}", "descriptions": {{ $json.content[0].text }} }

={ "model": "claude-opus-4-6", "max_tokens": 1000, "system": "You are the expert estimator for PrintHub Africa...", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Customer {{ $json.customerName }} wants a quote for: {{ $json.projectName }}. Details: {{ $json.description }}. Write a professional draft response with a suggested price (if possible based on context) and breakdown. Include warm Kenyan business greeting. Return valid JSON: { 'draft': '...', 'suggestedPrice': 0, 'breakdown': '...' }" }] }

={ "quoteId": "{{ $node['Get Quote Details'].json.id }}", "draft": "{{ $json.content[0].text.draft }}", "amount": {{ $json.content[0].text.suggestedPrice || 0 }}, "breakdown": "{{ $json.content[0].text.breakdown }}" }

={ "model": "gpt-4o-mini", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "Analyse the sentiment of this customer message for PrintHub Africa. Is it Positive, Neutral, or Negative? Give a score from 1-10 where 10 is very happy and 1 is furious." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Message: {{ $json.message }}" }] }

={ "email": "{{ $node['Webhook: Analyse Sentiment'].json.email }}", "phone": "{{ $node['Webhook: Analyse Sentiment'].json.phone }}", "sentiment": "{{ $json.choices[0].message.content.match(/(Positive|Neutral|Negative)/)[0] }}", "score": {{ parseInt($json.choices[0].message.content.match(/\d+/)[0]) }}, "message": "{{ $node['Webhook: Analyse Sentiment'].json.message }}" }

name: AI-8 — Generate Lifestyle Mockups (DALL-E 3 + Stability AI)

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={ "model": "dall-e-3", "prompt": "{{ $json.instagramPrompt }}", "n": 1, "size": "1024x1024", "quality": "standard", "style": "natural" }
={ "model": "dall-e-3", "prompt": "{{ $json.linkedinPrompt }}", "n": 1, "size": "1792x1024", "quality": "standard", "style": "natural" }
={ "model": "dall-e-3", "prompt": "{{ $json.tiktokPrompt }}", "n": 1, "size": "1024x1792", "quality": "standard", "style": "natural" }

={ "text_prompts": [{ "text": "{{ $json.instagramPrompt }} photorealistic", "weight": 1 }, { "text": "blurry, low quality, text, watermark, logo", "weight": -1 }], "cfg_scale": 7, "height": 1024, "width": 1024, "samples": 2, "steps": 30 }
={{ JSON.stringify({ productId: $json.productId, imageUrls: $json.imageUrls }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ productId: $node['Upload Mockups to R2'].json.results[0]?.productId || $node['Build DALL-E Prompts'].json.productId, mockups: $node['Upload Mockups to R2'].json.results }) }}

={ "from": "PrintHub AI ", "to": "{{$env.ADMIN_EMAIL}}", "subject": "Mockups Ready for Approval: {{$node['Build DALL-E Prompts'].json.productName}}", "html": "

Lifestyle Mockups Ready

{{$node['Upload Mockups to R2'].json.results.length}} mockups generated for {{$node['Build DALL-E Prompts'].json.productName}}.

Approve in AI Control Centre →

" }

parameters.name: body
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflowName: 'AI-8 Lifestyle Mockups', errorMessage: $json.message || 'Unknown error', node: $json.node || 'Unknown node', executionId: $execution.id }) }}

name: AI-9 — Generate Video Content (ElevenLabs + Runway ML)

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={ "model": "claude-opus-4-6", "max_tokens": 400, "system": "You are the content and customer service AI for PrintHub Africa, a professional large-format and 3D printing company based in Nairobi, Kenya. Your tone is warm, professional, and expert. You understand the Kenyan market. Prices are always in KES. You never promise specific delivery times unless given them explicitly. You never invent product specs. When writing for customers, be friendly and helpful. When writing social media content, be engaging and locally relevant. Always write in British English (used in Kenya). Never use American spellings.", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Write a {{ $json.targetPlatform === 'tiktok' ? '15' : '30' }}-second spoken video script for {{ $json.productName }} on {{ $json.targetPlatform }}. Return JSON: { 'script': 'spoken words only', 'hook': 'first 3 words', 'cta': 'final call to action' }" }] }
={ "text": "{{ $json.script }}", "model_id": "eleven_multilingual_v2", "voice_settings": { "stability": 0.5, "similarity_boost": 0.75, "style": 0.3, "use_speaker_boost": true } }

={ "model": "gen3a_turbo", "promptImage": "{{ $json.mockupImageUrl }}", "promptText": "Slow cinematic zoom in on the product. Professional product reveal. Smooth camera movement. {{ $json.productName }} in lifestyle setting.", "duration": 5, "ratio": "{{ $json.targetPlatform === 'tiktok' || $json.targetPlatform === 'instagram_reels' ? '768:1280' : '1280:768' }}", "watermark": false }

={ "videoUrl": "{{ $node['Poll Runway Status'].json.output[0] }}", "audioUrl": "{{ $node['ElevenLabs: Generate Voiceover'].json.audioUrl || '' }}", "outputKey": "product-videos/{{ $json.productId }}/{{ $json.targetPlatform }}-{{ Date.now() }}.mp4" }

={ "productId": "{{ $json.productId }}", "platform": "{{ $json.targetPlatform }}", "videoUrl": "{{ $node['Combine Video + Audio'].json.outputUrl }}", "thumbnailUrl": "{{ $json.mockupImageUrl }}", "duration": 5 }
={ "model": "whisper-1", "language": "en", "prompt": "PrintHub Africa customer service. Kenyan English. Printing services, 3D printing, banners, signage." }

={ "model": "claude-opus-4-6", "max_tokens": 400, "system": "You are the content and customer service AI for PrintHub Africa, a professional large-format and 3D printing company based in Nairobi, Kenya. Your tone is warm, professional, and expert. You understand the Kenyan market. Prices are always in KES. You never promise specific delivery times unless given them explicitly. You never invent product specs. When writing for customers, be friendly and helpful. When writing social media content, be engaging and locally relevant. Always write in British English (used in Kenya). Never use American spellings. Note: this customer sent a voice note that was transcribed. Acknowledge naturally if relevant.", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Customer ({{ $json.customerName }}): {{ $json.messageText }}" }] }

parameters.text: ={{ $node['Claude: Generate Reply'].json.content?.[0]?.text || 'Thank you for your message! We will get back to you shortly.' }}

parameters.bodyParametersJson:
={ "from": "PrintHub Telegram ", "to": "{{$env.ADMIN_EMAIL}}", "subject": "Telegram Customer Needs Human Support", "html": "

Customer {{ $node['Normalise Message'].json.customerName }} on Telegram needs human support.

Message: {{ $node['Normalise Message'].json.messageText }}

" }

={ "languageCode": "en", "summary": "{{ $json.captions.google_business }}", "callToAction": { "actionType": "SHOP", "url": "https://printhub.africa/shop/{{ $json.productSlug }}" }, "media": [{ "mediaFormat": "PHOTO", "sourceUrl": "{{ $json.approvedMockupUrl }}" }], "topicType": "PRODUCT", "offer": { "couponCode": "", "redeemOnlineUrl": "https://printhub.africa/shop/{{ $json.productSlug }}", "termsConditions": "While stocks last" } }

={ "businessId": "{{ $env.BING_BUSINESS_ID }}", "post": { "title": "{{ $json.productName }}", "description": "{{ $json.shortDescription }}", "imageUrl": "{{ $json.approvedMockupUrl }}", "actionType": "LEARN_MORE", "actionUrl": "https://printhub.africa/shop/{{ $json.productSlug }}" } }

={ "title": "{{ $node['Execute Trigger'].json.productName }}", "subtitle": "{{ $node['Execute Trigger'].json.shortDescription }}", "image": { "url": "{{ $node['Execute Trigger'].json.approvedMockupUrl }}" }, "action": { "type": "link", "url": "https://printhub.africa/shop/{{ $node['Execute Trigger'].json.productSlug }}" } }
={ "email": "{{ $env.PIGIAME_EMAIL }}", "password": "{{ $env.PIGIAME_PASSWORD }}" }
={ "grant_type": "password", "username": "{{ $env.OLX_EMAIL }}", "password": "{{ $env.OLX_PASSWORD }}", "client_id": "olx-kenya-web" }

={ "model": "gpt-4o", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "You write Reddit posts for PrintHub Africa..." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Write a Reddit post about {{ $json.productName }} for r/Kenya. Return JSON { title, body }." }] }

={ "sr": "Kenya", "kind": "image", "title": "{{ JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content).title }}", "url": "{{ $node['Execute Trigger'].json.approvedMockupUrl }}", "text": "{{ JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content).body }}" }
={ "model": "claude-opus-4-6", "max_tokens": 2000, "system": "You are writing a LinkedIn Newsletter...", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Write newsletter for {{ $json.productName }}." }] }

={ "author": "urn:li:organization:{{$env.LINKEDIN_ORGANIZATION_ID}}", "lifecycleState": "PUBLISHED", "specificContent": { "com.linkedin.ugc.ShareContent": { "shareCommentary": { "text": "{{ JSON.parse($json.content[0].text).headline }}" }, "shareMediaCategory": "ARTICLE", "media": [{ "status": "READY", "description": { "text": "{{ JSON.parse($json.content[0].text).subheadline }}" }, "originalUrl": "https://printhub.africa/shop/{{$json.productSlug}}", "title": { "text": "{{ JSON.parse($json.content[0].text).headline }}" } }] } } }

={ "title": "{{ JSON.parse($node['Claude: LinkedIn Article'].json.content[0].text).headline }}", "contentFormat": "html", "content": "{{ JSON.parse($node['Claude: LinkedIn Article'].json.content[0].text).body_html }}", "publishStatus": "public", "canonicalUrl": "https://printhub.africa/shop/{{$json.productSlug}}" }
